message:
test(fcp-bootstrap): pin upper bound on BOOTSTRAP_CERT_NOT_BEFORE_SKEW_SECS

REVIEW fresh-eyes pass (cc_1) found that
select_cert_accepts_leaf_and_ca_not_before_within_bootstrap_skew
(added in efc659b6 to cover the +60s not_before tolerance) asserts
only the accept-within-window direction. If a future commit
accidentally widened BOOTSTRAP_CERT_NOT_BEFORE_SKEW_SECS from 60 to
e.g. 86400, the accept test would silently keep passing and no other
test would fire.

Added select_cert_rejects_leaf_not_before_far_beyond_bootstrap_skew:
a leaf cert with not_before = now + 600s (10× the tolerance) must be
rejected with CertificateSelectionFailed(NoVerifiedIssuerChain). If
the constant is ever widened beyond 600s this test needs updating —
that failure surfaces the decision rather than hiding it.

No behavioural change, test-only addition.

Verified: cargo test -p fcp-bootstrap --lib
select_cert_rejects_leaf_not_before_far_beyond_bootstrap_skew — pass.

Cc_1 / SunnyMoose REVIEW-MODE P2
